steps.title: Spot the number of the noun
steps.content: The blank precedes “important place” — a singular noun, not plural.

steps.title: Apply number agreement
steps.content: A demonstrative adjective must agree in number with the noun it modifies. “This” is singular and matches the singular noun “place.” “Both,” “those,” and “these” are all plural forms that cannot modify a singular noun. That matches choice A — A is correct.
